testcase.name: test_ws_container_logs_rejects_bad_token

failure.message: AssertionError: err_InvalidStatus assert ('1008' in 'err_InvalidStatus' or 'rejected' in 'err_InvalidStatus' or 'closed' in 'err_InvalidStatus')
